validation_checks.description: Main Menu scene contains a Button node named 'StartButton'.
Gameplay scene contains a Node2D named 'Player'.
Gameplay scene contains a Node2D named 'LetterSpawner'.
Gameplay scene contains a Control node named 'HUD'.
LetterEnemy scene contains a Label node named 'LetterLabel'.
FailPopup scene contains Label 'ResultLabel' and Buttons 'RetryButton' and 'MenuButton'.
All referenced script files exist in the project.

repair_hints: Ensure that the 'StartButton' in MainMenu is connected to a signal that loads the Gameplay scene.
Add a Timer node to LetterSpawner to handle spawn intervals and difficulty scaling.
Implement input handling in Player.gd to match typed letters with spawned LetterEnemy instances.
Add a Label named 'SurvivalTimeLabel' inside HUD to display the survival time.
Connect the 'RetryButton' in FailPopup to reload the Gameplay scene and the 'MenuButton' to load MainMenu.
